name: nadesiko3

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:node && npm run test:common
scripts.test:browser: cross-env TZ=Asia/Tokyo NODE_ENV=development karma start --single-run --browsers FirefoxCustomHeadless --reporters=mocha test/browser/karma.config.cjs
scripts.test:bundled: cross-env TZ=Asia/Tokyo NODE_ENV=development karma start --single-run --browsers FirefoxCustomHeadless test/bundled/karma.config.cjs
scripts.test:bundled:watch: cross-env TZ=Asia/Tokyo NODE_ENV=development karma start --auto-watch --browsers FirefoxCustom test/bundled/karma.config.cjs
scripts.test:ace-editor: cross-env TZ=Asia/Tokyo NODE_ENV=development karma start --single-run --browsers FirefoxCustomHeadless test/ace_editor/karma.config.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:core && npm run test:node && npm run test:browser && npm run test:bundled && npm run test:ace-editor
scripts.test:bundled:win: cross-env TZ=Asia/Tokyo NODE_ENV=development karma start --single-run --browsers FirefoxCustomHeadless,ChromeCustomHeadless,EdgeHeadless,IE test/bundled/karma.config.base.js
scripts.build: npm run build:tsc && npm run build:nako_version && npm run build:tsc && npm run build:command && npm run build:esbuild && node src/cnako3.mjs batch/calc_hash.nako3
scripts.clean: npm run build:tsc && node src/cnako3.mjs batch/clean.nako3
scripts.build:command: cross-env REPORT_ERR=1 npm run check:command && node src/cnako3.mjs batch/build_command.nako3
scripts.publish:desc: node -e "console.log('Please exec => npm run build && npm run test:all && npm publish && npm run publish:version')
scripts.publish:version: node src/cnako3.mjs batch/publish_version.nako3 && node src/cnako3.mjs batch/copy_core.nako3

keywords: 日本語プログラミング言語
author: kujirahand
